title: Golden-file parser tests from real Snowflake repo
description: Open sub-item of roadmap #4 (docs/plans/2026-06-10-phase1-cll-roadmap.md). Real compiled SQL lives locally (env var DBT_OSMOSIS_CLL_GOLDEN_DIR points at a target/compiled/<pkg> dir). Add an env-gated corpus test (parse all files, no exceptions, plausible lineage) plus committed SANITIZED fixtures for tricky patterns. Never commit real internal SQL or identifiers to this public repo.
close_reason: Done in ba4074a: env-gated corpus test (DBT_OSMOSIS_CLL_GOLDEN_DIR), sanitized fixtures, plus the top-level-union-star fix the corpus surfaced. Real repo: 463 files, 0 exceptions, 99.6% lineage yield.

title: Live-test lineage explorer with lineage-ui extra
description: lineage explore (roadmap #6, c5a1b0d) is wired and unit-tested but never served live: dev env lacks the lineage-ui extra. Install with: uv pip install -e '.[lineage-ui]', run dbt compile in a project, then dbt-osmosis-cll lineage explore; click through model/column lineage in the browser.

title: Clean basedpyright baseline and re-enable CI hard gate
description: ~20 pre-existing basedpyright errors inherited from the forks. CI (tests.yml) runs basedpyright report-only since 12f5619; once the baseline is 0, restore the errorCount exit-1 gate.

title: Evaluate sqlglot optimizer.scope for parser scope resolution
description: Roadmap #4 notes: adopt sqlglot.optimizer.scope for scope RESOLUTION only (replacing hand-rolled boundary walks in get_scoped_table_aliases / get_scoped_tables_from_select), keeping our semantic classification. Gate the swap on the golden-file corpus test.

title: Clean ruff baseline; restore pre-commit --all-files in lint CI
description: ~760 pre-existing ruff findings. lint.yml lints only the changed range since 12f5619; after a baseline cleanup (task format + manual fixes), switch back to pre-commit run --all-files.
